{{Infobox artifact
| name = The Device
| introduced = lh-02-the-engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[The Device]] grows larger as it drifts out through the hull of the battleship.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c33">''The Engineer'', chapter 33</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[The Device]] is an obsidian-jewel object that hovers over [[Starhammer]]'s shoulder.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c42">''The Engineer'', chapter 42</ref>}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[The Device]] is an entity that responds to the hilt of the [[Zenith Blade]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c47">''The Pilot'', chapter 47</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon artifacts]]
